summary: Do not ship: the connectors UI miscomputes credential presence and OAuth health whenever the vault is locked, showing missing/not connected instead of locked/unknown.

findings.title: Locked vault is rendered as missing credentials / disconnected OAuth, violating the connector-status contract
findings.recommendation: Do not derive connector status from `vaultView().secrets` when `view.unlocked` is false. Return an explicit locked/unknown state from the API, and have `buildConnectorsView` / `ConnectorsPanel` preserve that state instead of treating it as `[]` and `undefined`. Today a locked vault collapses to `names=[]` and `oauthHealth=[]`, so API-key connectors show every scoped secret as absent and OAuth connectors show `not connected`, even if the sealed credentials are present on disk.
